Common.appName: Shri Veer Patta School Fee Admin
Common.school: Shri Veer Patta Senior Secondary School

workbookViews.transactionsDescription: Latest posted receipt records with current paid and outstanding context.
workbookViews.collectionTodayDescription: Daily summary totals for day-book checking.
workbookViews.receiptsDescription: Receipt register for reprints, verification, and desk follow-up.
workbookViews.studentDuesDescription: Student-wise dues, paid, pending, discount, and next-due view.
workbookViews.installmentsDescription: Student-wise pending installment view with next due and late fee position.
workbookViews.classRegisterDescription: Workbook-style class register with summary totals and compact payment history.
workbookViews.defaultersDescription: Overdue students with phone-ready follow-up details.
workbookViews.importIssuesDescription: Recent import rows that still need office review.
workbookViews.exportsDescription: Download permanent finance views as CSV files.

Defaulters.title: Outstanding follow-up register
Defaulters.description: Phone-ready overdue list for {session}. Highest risk appears first.
Defaulters.officeNotice: Use this screen for calls and follow-up only. Collect payments from Payment Desk.
Defaulters.filtersDescription: Keep the follow-up list narrow enough for the office team to act on.
Defaulters.metricStudentsListedHint: Students currently matching the selected follow-up filters.
Defaulters.metricPendingAmountHint: Current outstanding balance across listed students.
Defaulters.metricOverdueInstallmentsHint: Installments already past due date and still unpaid. Amounts below show late fee separately.
Defaulters.metricOpenInstallmentsHint: Pending, partial, and overdue installments across the listed rows.
Defaulters.metricMissingDuesHint: Active students whose dues need preparation, not counted as true defaulters.
Defaulters.missingDuesTitle: Students whose dues are not prepared
Defaulters.missingDuesDescription: These active students are not treated as defaulters yet. Prepare dues before collection or follow-up.
Defaulters.listDescription: Ranked by pending amount and overdue days so the highest-risk follow-ups appear first.
Defaulters.emptyDefaulters: No defaulters found for the selected filters.
Defaulters.routeTransportDescription: Use this view for transport follow-up and route-level reconciliation work.
Defaulters.routeTransportEmpty: No route-wise outstanding rows for the selected filters.
Defaulters.routeStudentListDescription: Operational student list grouped by route for office calls and overdue follow-up.
Defaulters.routeStudentListEmpty: No route-wise students for the selected filters.
Defaulters.desktopPickHint: Click any row on the left to open the contact log and quick actions.
Defaulters.popoverPromisedDateHint: We'll re-surface this student on the promised date in your 'Soon' bucket.
Defaulters.whatsappWillAutoLog: Sending will auto-log a WhatsApp contact attempt for this student.
Defaulters.whatsappAutoLogged: WhatsApp send logged in the contact history.
Defaulters.feeEmpty: No fee data prepared for this student yet.
Defaulters.feeNoPayments: No payments received yet this session.
Defaulters.popoverSnoozeHint: If set, this student moves to the "This week" or "Snoozed" tab.
Defaulters.popoverNotePlaceholder: e.g. Will pay by 20th, needs installment breakdown…
Defaulters.voiceNoteUnsupported: Audio recording is not supported in this browser.
Defaulters.voiceNotePermissionDenied: Could not start recording (microphone permission denied?).
Defaulters.whatsappDisclaimer: Copy this text and paste into WhatsApp. The app does not send messages.
Defaulters.bulkSendButton: Send WhatsApp to {count, plural, =1 {# parent} other {# parents}}
Defaulters.bulkSheetTitle: WhatsApp to {count, plural, =1 {# parent} other {# parents}}
Defaulters.bulkSheetDescription: Choose a template, review the preview, then open one WhatsApp draft per parent.
Defaulters.bulkNoTemplates: No active templates. Create one under Admin Tools → WhatsApp templates.
Defaulters.bulkNoPhoneMessage: {count, plural, =1 {# selected parent has} other {# selected parents have}} no phone number on file and will be skipped:
Defaulters.bulkOpenInfo: Confirming will open {count, plural, =1 {# new browser tab} other {# new browser tabs}}, one per parent. Send each manually after reviewing.
Defaulters.bulkOpenButton: Open {count, plural, =1 {# WhatsApp tab} other {# WhatsApp tabs}}

Exports.title: Exports
Exports.description: Download Excel files for students, dues, follow-up, and receipts.
Exports.officeNotice: On mobile, downloads may open in your browser or spreadsheet app depending on device settings.
Exports.groupChooseHint: Choose the file that matches the office task.
Exports.itemAllStudentsDetail: Complete student list for office checking.
Exports.itemDiscountStudentsDetail: RTE, staff child, and sibling policy.
Exports.itemClassWiseDuesDetail: Class totals and pending fee review.
Exports.itemDefaultersDetail: Follow-up list for pending and overdue dues.
Exports.itemReceiptRegisterDetail: Saved receipt records for office accounts.
Exports.itemAiContextBundleDetail: Multi-sheet workbook with students, installments, payments, classes, routes, discounts, defaulters and a README. Large file — may take 10–20 seconds to generate.

FeeSetup.title: Academic Year Fee Setup
FeeSetup.description: Set yearly fees, due dates, class fees, and transport fees. Saving syncs dues automatically.
FeeSetup.topbarSaveAria: Save fee setup and sync dues
FeeSetup.permissionNotice: Only admins can change Fee Setup. Accountant and read-only staff can review the current and saved setup here.
FeeSetup.unsavedNoticeSuffix: in the top bar to apply and sync dues.
FeeSetup.savingInfoNotice: Saving updates future or unpaid dues automatically. Paid or adjusted rows stay protected for review.
FeeSetup.academicYearDescription: Choose the year for this fee setup.
FeeSetup.testSessionNotice: This is a test academic year. Do not mix real students or real payments into test records.
FeeSetup.advancedYearDescription: Old-year maintenance and saved setup details.
FeeSetup.savedSetupFeeHeads: {count, plural, =1 {# fee head} other {# fee heads}}
FeeSetup.basicDescription: Set installment dates, late fee, and the annual academic fee for new and existing students.
FeeSetup.installmentDatesDescription: These dates define this academic year's fee schedule.
FeeSetup.annualRulesDescription: Default yearly amounts used when dues are prepared.
FeeSetup.academicFeeDistributionDescription: Choose how the annual academic fee is spread across installments. Existing installment rows are not changed by this setting — it applies to new regenerations and any future fee setup.
FeeSetup.firstOnlyOptionDescription: Add the full academic fee to installment 1. Installments 2–N carry only the tuition / transport share. Recommended — matches current school practice.
FeeSetup.equalOptionDescription: Divide the annual academic fee evenly into each installment. Use this when parents prefer a flatter payment schedule.
FeeSetup.discountsDescription: Configure standard school discount policies. Student assignment stays in Students.
FeeSetup.discountsInnerDescription: Configure standard school policies. Student-specific approval is done from Students.
FeeSetup.feeHeadsDescription: Review extra fee heads saved with the selected academic year.
FeeSetup.feeHeadsAdvisory: Most schools do not need this during normal yearly fee setup. AY 2026-27 fee calculation still uses tuition, transport, academic fee, and signed other adjustment.
FeeSetup.noFeeHeads: No extra fee heads are configured for this session yet.
FeeSetup.classesDescription: Enter the annual tuition fee for each class.
FeeSetup.noClassesFound: No classes found. Add classes from School Lists or First-time Setup.
FeeSetup.advancedClassDescription: Manage class list, status, and unused rows.
FeeSetup.tuitionWillSync: Tuition will save and sync automatically.
FeeSetup.transportDescription: Enter the annual transport fee for each route. Leave transport blank if the school is not using route fees.
FeeSetup.noRoutesFound: No transport routes found. Add routes from School Lists, or leave transport blank if not used.
FeeSetup.advancedRouteDescription: Manage route names, route codes, status, and unused routes.
FeeSetup.routeFeeWillSync: Route fee will save and sync automatically.
FeeSetup.generateDescription: Apply the current Fee Setup to all unpaid and future dues. Rows with existing payments are preserved.
FeeSetup.generateRecentDescription: Recent review and saved runs stay visible even when a new dues update is blocked.
FeeSetup.generateRowsRecalculated: {count} rows recalculated. Rows with prior payments were preserved.
FeeSetup.generateReasonPlaceholder: Describe why dues are being updated, such as a fee change or revised installment dates.
FeeSetup.generateReasonHelp: This reason is saved with the audit record.
FeeSetup.generateIdlePrompt: Enter a reason and update dues to apply the current Fee Setup to all unpaid and future dues.
FeeSetup.generateFootnote: Payments, receipts, and payment adjustments remain append-only. This workflow only recalculates future or unpaid rows and leaves paid history intact.
FeeSetup.timeTravelDescription: Reconstructed view of the active fee policy and per-class fees as of a chosen date. Read-only; sourced from audit_logs.
FeeSetup.timeTravelChooseDescription: Pick the day you want to inspect. The page rebuilds the policy snapshot from audit_logs.
FeeSetup.timeTravelPolicyDescription: The newest active fee_policy_configs row at or before the chosen date.
FeeSetup.timeTravelPolicyEmpty: No fee_policy_configs record was active on or before this date.
FeeSetup.timeTravelClassFeesDescription: Latest active fee_settings row per class at or before the chosen date.
FeeSetup.timeTravelClassFeesEmpty: No class fee rows were active on or before this date.
FeeSetup.timeTravelStudentOverridesDescription: Latest active student_fee_overrides per student. Showing first 20 of {count}.
FeeSetup.timeTravelStudentOverridesEmpty: No active student overrides at this date.
FeeSetup.timeTravelFootnote: Inspected {policyCount} policy audit rows · {feeSettingCount} fee_settings rows · {overrideCount} override rows on or before {date}.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: Today's collection, pending dues, and follow-up - at a glance.
Dashboard.receiptsPosted: {count, plural, =1 {# receipt posted today} other {# receipts posted today}}
Dashboard.fullSessionDue: Full session due across {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}}
Dashboard.installmentPulseBody: pending across {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} in this session.
Dashboard.criticalAlertBody: Some fee data could not be loaded. Numbers may be incomplete.
Dashboard.noStudentsBody: Start with student records, then review Fee Setup before collection.
Dashboard.feeRecordsAttentionBody: The payment desk or dashboard data layer is not responding correctly. Open Admin Tools → Fee Data Troubleshooting for details.
Dashboard.preparedNotice: Refreshed dues for {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}}.
Dashboard.alertNoStudentsBody: Add or upload test students before relying on collection totals.
Dashboard.alertNoReceiptsBody: Today and trend sections will fill in after payments are posted at the Payment Desk.
Dashboard.alertsEmptyBody: No setup, import, or dues-update issues are visible right now.
Dashboard.duesUpdateStartedBody: Preparing dues for {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} in the background. Refresh in a moment to see the updated totals.
Dashboard.noClassFeePosition: No class-wise fee position is available yet.
Dashboard.collectionFunnelDescription: Session due is the full pending amount; overdue excludes late fee.
Dashboard.studentStatusRingDescription: Active vs leavers in this session.
Dashboard.classLeaderboardDescription: Ranked by collection rate. Red needs attention.
Dashboard.collectionHeatmapDescription: Day-wise receipt activity. Use the arrows to step through past months.
Dashboard.routeProgressDescription: Transport routes ordered by highest pending balance.
Dashboard.morningBriefAllClear: All installments on track — nothing to chase today.
Dashboard.morningBriefFollowUpOverdue: {label} is overdue — follow up with {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} for {amount}.
Dashboard.morningBriefFollowUpDueToday: {label} is due today — follow up with {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} for {amount}.
Dashboard.morningBriefFollowUpInstallment: Follow up with {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} for {amount} before {label} (due {dueDate}).
Dashboard.morningBriefFollowUp: Follow up with {count, plural, =1 {# student} other {# students}} for {amount} pending.

Payments.title: Payment Desk
Payments.description: Select a student, review dues, collect payment, and print the receipt.
Payments.offlineBody: Keep typing — your draft is saved locally per student. Reconnect before you confirm; the post happens once you tap the confirm button.
Payments.recoveredBody: Drafts are intact. Review the amount and confirm when ready.
Payments.waiveSheetDescription: Pending late fee: {amount}. Writes to the student's fee override; the receipt next issued will show the lower balance.
Payments.waivePreviousTotal: Previous standalone waivers on this student:
Payments.waiveAmountHint: Capped at the current pending late fee ({amount}).
Payments.waiveReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Family emergency, principal approval, etc.
Payments.waiveReasonHint: Minimum 4 characters. Reason is appended to the student's fee-override audit trail.
Payments.waiveStandaloneCaption: Standalone waiver (writes to fee override, audited):
Payments.blockingReasonReadOnlyDetail: You can review the desk but cannot post payments.
Payments.blockingReasonNoPolicyTitle: Fee Setup is incomplete for this year.
Payments.blockingReasonNoPolicyDetail: Open Fee Setup and publish the academic year policy before collecting payments.
Payments.blockingReasonNoClassTitle: No active classes for this academic year.
Payments.blockingReasonNoClassDetail: Open Master Data and activate at least one class for the session.
Payments.blockingReasonNoStudentTitle: Selected student could not be loaded.
Payments.blockingReasonNoStudentDetail: Refresh Payment Desk and select the student again.
Payments.blockingReasonInactiveStudentDetail: This student is not active, so new dues were not prepared.
Payments.blockingReasonSessionMismatchTitle: Selected student belongs to another academic session.
Payments.blockingReasonSessionMismatchDetail: This student is in {studentSession}, but Fee Setup is active for {policySession}.
Payments.blockingReasonReviewNeededDetail: Dues records already exist, but Payment Desk could not load payable balances. Ask an admin to run Fee Data Status before posting.
Payments.blockingReasonPrepareFailedDetailFallbac: Fee Setup is incomplete for this class/year. Check class fee amount, installment dates, and active session.
Payments.blockingReasonNotPreparedTitle: Dues are not prepared for this student.

Students.title: Students
Students.description: Add, search, bulk update, and review student-specific fee exceptions.
Students.sessionMismatchDescription: Fee Setup and student lists are not pointing to the same academic year.
Students.sessionMismatchBodyPrefix: Defaulting finance workflows to Fee Setup session
Students.loadWarningDescription: Some student workspace data could not be loaded safely. The page is still available.
Students.filterLoadWarning: Student filters could not be loaded safely: {error}
Students.filterLoadWarningFallback: Student filters could not be loaded safely.
Students.studentLoadWarning: Students could not be loaded safely: {error}
Students.studentLoadWarningFallback: Students could not be loaded safely.
Students.searchPlaceholder: Student name, SR no, or phone
Students.findStudentsDescription: Search by student name, SR no, or phone, then narrow by class, route, or status.
Students.pendingSrNotice: {count, plural, =1 {# student still has} other {# students still have}} temporary SR numbers - assign permanent SR nos before fee collection.
Students.studentLoadError: Students could not be loaded for this filter. Try clearing filters or selecting another class.
Students.emptyFiltered: No records match the selected filters. Try clearing filters or broadening the search.
Students.emptyFresh: Start by adding the first student record for this session.
Students.discountHintRte: RTE — tuition waived to ₹0 for this session.

Transactions.loadingDescription: Fetching receipts, dues, and export-ready records for the selected view.
Transactions.title: Transactions
Transactions.description: Read-only receipts, dues, class register, and payment history.
Transactions.trustBadgeBody: Append-only · click any receipt for the audit trail
Transactions.viewFilterDescription: Switch views instantly. Filters apply without reloading the page.
Transactions.filterSearchPlaceholder: Student, SR no, receipt no, phone…
Transactions.summaryClassDescription: Top-level register totals for the selected class or working set.
Transactions.summaryWorkingDescription: Essential totals first, more totals only when needed.
Transactions.tableEmpty: No transactions found for this view.
Transactions.receiptsDescriptionShort: Receipt register with print, student, and payment desk shortcuts.
Transactions.duesTrackerDescription: Student-wise dues tracker with pending installments and next due details.
Transactions.studentDuesDescription: Student-wise dues, paid, pending, discount, and next-due details.
Transactions.classRegisterDescription: Class register with dues status, paid, pending, and actions.
Transactions.defaultersDescription: Overdue-only follow-up register with phone-ready details.
Transactions.collectionTodayDescription: Grouped daily collection totals for desk and day-book recheck.
Transactions.importIssuesDescription: Recent staged rows that still need review or cleanup.
Transactions.exportsSectionBodySuffix: tab in the sidebar to download finance data as CSV.

Receipts.indexDescription: Search receipts and open printable copies.
Receipts.lookupDescription: Search by receipt number or reference number.
Receipts.recentCount: {count, plural, =1 {# receipt} other {# receipts}} in this view.
Receipts.emptyMobile: No receipts found for this filter.
Receipts.tableEmpty: No receipts found for this filter.
Receipts.detailDescription: Formal receipt view with print-friendly layout for office records and reprints.
Receipts.previewSheetDescription: Quick preview. Open full page to print or share.
Receipts.shareSheetDescription: Review the message, then open WhatsApp or your email client to send.
Receipts.shareMailNote: The mail client will not auto-attach the PDF. Save the receipt as PDF first (from the print dialog) and attach it before sending.
Receipts.conventionalDiscountTagline: Tuition-only policy applied for this academic session.
Receipts.supersededPolicyItem: {name} ({code}) — superseded by the lower candidate tuition above; no additional savings on this receipt.
Receipts.officialReceiptStatement: This is an official school fee receipt.
Receipts.keepRecordsStatement: Please keep this receipt for your records.
Receipts.v2FeeDetailHint: Conventional discount + full fee breakup. Shown on screen for office reference; not printed.

AdminTools.title: Admin Tools
AdminTools.description: Setup and staff tools. Routine dues sync runs automatically from Students and Fee Setup.
AdminTools.noticeAutoSyncedTitle: Automatic sync just updated this session
AdminTools.noticeHealthUnavailableBody: Admin Tools opened, but the automatic health check could not finish. {error}
AdminTools.noticeAutoSyncedBody: {session} was reconciled automatically. Continue normal work in Students, Fee Setup, Payment Desk, and Transactions.
AdminTools.noticeAutoOnBody: The app prepares dues after student changes, imports, Fee Setup changes, and selected-student Payment Desk loading. Admin Tools is now only for review and rare setup tasks.
AdminTools.syncReasonAutoUnavailable: Automatic sync is available to fee setup admins.
AdminTools.syncReasonHealthFailed: Admin Tools opened, but the automatic health check could not finish. Normal pages remain available while setup is reviewed.
AdminTools.sessionStatusDescription: This shows whether the selected year is ready for Dashboard, Payment Desk, Transactions, and Defaulters.
AdminTools.qualityDescription: Read-only guardrails for offline fallback, visual checks, and workflow speed targets.
AdminTools.qualityOfflineDetail: Payments and receipts still require server confirmation.
AdminTools.qualityWorkflowDetail: Search-to-student selection budget for counter work.
AdminTools.qualityVisualDetail: Dashboard, Payment Desk, Students, Reports, and Admin Tools in TEST session.
AdminTools.activityDescription: Recent staff actions across the workspace. Read-only audit trail for the day-to-day.
AdminTools.activityRecentDescription: Most recent 100 events first. Older events drop off the feed but remain in the table.
AdminTools.promotionDescription: Build a per-student preview that proposes next-year classes (Class 8 → Class 9, etc.), apply it once verified, and roll back if needed.
AdminTools.promotionStartDescription: Sessions follow the format 2026-27 / 2027-28. The target session's classes and fee setup must already be in place.
AdminTools.promotionBuildPreviewHint: No student records are changed until you explicitly Apply on the next screen.
AdminTools.promotionRecentDescription: History of previous promotion attempts. Click any run to view its details.
AdminTools.promotionSummaryDescription: Counts derived from per-student decisions. Review carefully before applying.
AdminTools.promotionApplyDescription: Once you apply, every promote/graduate entry is committed. Type APPLY in the box to confirm.
AdminTools.promotionApplyHint: Verify the next-year fee setup is in place. Dues are re-prepared automatically afterwards.
AdminTools.promotionRollbackDescription: Reverses the class/status changes and undoes credit carry-forward. Type ROLLBACK to confirm.
AdminTools.promotionPlanDescription: Review each row. Switch decisions if needed.
AdminTools.sessionHealthDescription: Review each academic year. Missing dues are prepared automatically when Fee Setup is complete.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAutoSyncedBody: Safe missing dues were prepared automatically. Remaining warnings need Fee Setup or database review.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAllHealthyBody: Every session has prepared dues and class fee settings.
AdminTools.sessionHealthAttentionBody: Use Fee Setup for class fee gaps. Manual reconcile remains available only as a fallback.
AdminTools.sessionHealthCardAttentionDesc: This session needs a dues or fee setup review.
AdminTools.sessionHealthSyncReasonAutoUnavailable: Automatic sync is available to fee setup admins.
AdminTools.sessionHealthSyncReasonFailed: Health check could not finish for this session. Normal pages remain available while setup is reviewed.
AdminTools.whatsappDescription: Pre-canned message templates with placeholder variables used by the defaulters list and receipt sharing.
AdminTools.whatsappNoticeBody: The app never sends WhatsApp messages on its own. It renders the template with the selected student's data, opens a wa.me link, and lets the staff member review and send manually.
AdminTools.whatsappLibraryDescription: Templates available to staff for defaulter follow-ups and receipt confirmations.
AdminTools.whatsappEmpty: No templates yet. Create one to enable bulk WhatsApp drafts from the defaulters page.
AdminTools.whatsappEditorDescription: Use '{{token}}' placeholders. The app renders these before opening WhatsApp.
AdminTools.whatsappEditorConfirmDelete: Delete template "{name}"? Active drafts will not be affected.
AdminTools.whatsappPlaceholderFatherName: Father's name from the student record.
AdminTools.whatsappPlaceholderDueDate: Oldest due date in DD-MM-YYYY form.

Toasts.shareLinkCopiedDescription: Send it to the parent via WhatsApp or SMS.
Toasts.shareLinkReadyDescription: Copy the URL below and send it to the parent.
Toasts.shareLinkRevokedDescription: The parent can no longer open it.
Toasts.copyFailedDescription: Long-press the URL to copy manually.
